description: Stateful Node.js microservice consuming AISStream (WebSocket) and OpenSky Network (REST poll), normalizing payloads to unified VesselState schema, broadcasting to Firebase Realtime DB / Firestore, internal WS server, and REST snapshot endpoint.

userStories.title: Project Foundation & Logger
userStories.description: As the engine, I need a Node.js project with Fastify, pino logger, folder structure, and .env.example so that all modules have a consistent shell to run in.
acceptanceCriteria: package.json present with all dependencies from PRD §2
src/ folder structure matches PRD §13 exactly
.env.example has all 11 env vars from PRD §12
logger.js exports pino with pino-pretty in dev, JSON in prod

userStories.title: Core Calculators
userStories.description: As the engine, I need ETA (Haversine+SOG), dead-reckoning (project 5/10/15 min ahead), and anomaly detection (sharp turn, sudden stop, emergency squawk) calculators.
acceptanceCriteria: eta.js: haversine distance, ETA ISO-8601, etaConfidence enum
deadReckoning.js: returns [{lat, lon, minutesAhead}] for 5, 10, 15 min
anomaly.js: detects SHARP_TURN (|RoT|>60), SUDDEN_STOP (SOG drop), EMERGENCY_SQUAWK (7500/7600/7700)

userStories.title: AIS Normalizer
userStories.description: As the engine, I need to convert raw AISStream PositionReport, ShipStaticData, and StandardClassBPositionReport into VesselState objects with all fields from PRD §3 and §5.
acceptanceCriteria: Vessel type filter: skips Military(35) and Fishing(30)

userStories.title: ADS-B Normalizer
userStories.description: As the engine, I need to convert raw OpenSky state vectors into VesselState objects.
acceptanceCriteria: Filters: on_ground==false, category IN [4,5,6], last_contact within 120s

userStories.title: AISStream WebSocket Connector
userStories.description: As the engine, I need a persistent WebSocket connection to AISStream.io with exponential backoff reconnection and message dispatch.
acceptanceCriteria: Sends subscription with AISSTREAM_API_KEY and all 4 FilterMessageTypes

userStories.title: OpenSky OAuth2 Polling Connector
userStories.description: As the engine, I need OAuth2 token management and a 30-second polling loop against OpenSky /states/all.

userStories.title: Firebase Writer
userStories.description: As the engine, I need to write VesselState to Firebase Realtime DB (state+trail) and Firestore (profile+alerts) with retry logic.
acceptanceCriteria: 3x retry with 500ms delay, then localQueue fallback

userStories.title: Local Queue Fallback
userStories.description: As the engine, I need a local file-based queue for failed Firebase writes.
acceptanceCriteria: Writes failed VesselState to local JSONL file
Queue drains periodically when Firebase is available

userStories.title: LOD Priority Scorer
userStories.description: As the engine, I need to score and rank vessels for LOD slider selection using the formula from PRD §6.
acceptanceCriteria: Score = isUnderway×40 + hasActiveThreats×30 + isOperatorTracked×20 + dataQuality=HIGH×5 + random(0–5)

userStories.title: WebSocket Backup Transport (B)
userStories.description: As a CesiumJS client, I need a WebSocket endpoint at ws://localhost:3001/vessels/stream to receive VesselState patches every 5s.
acceptanceCriteria: Pushes delta patches every 5s per subscribed vessel

userStories.title: REST Snapshot Transport (C)
userStories.description: As a CesiumJS client, I need GET /vessels/snapshot to return current VesselState[] at requested LOD, cached for 10s.

userStories.title: API Routes & Entry Point
userStories.description: As the system operator, I need POST /lod, GET /vessels/snapshot, and GET /health endpoints with x-api-key auth.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /lod { count } changes LOD and logs LOD_CHANGE
x-api-key auth on all routes via INTERNAL_API_KEY

userStories.title: Docker & DevOps
userStories.description: As the operator, I need a Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml for local deployment per Q2.
acceptanceCriteria: docker-compose.yml has vdie service with env_file .env
node --check passes for all source files
